selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
persona = null

response_raw:
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","opinion":"As an AI language model, I can provide advice on how to handle talks regarding healthcare and COVID immunizations. It is crucial to be well-versed in the most recent scientific data and knowledge when taking part in these discussions since they may quickly get heated and emotional. To foster a factual and useful discourse, it's essential to listen actively, ask questions, and provide evidence from reputable sources. Also, it is vital to be aware of and respect the viewpoints of others while defending one's own. A constructive and productive conversation can be facilitated by maintaining a polite and open-minded attitude.","reasoning_summary":". Maintain a neutral tone, pay attention actively, question, and back up your claims with evidence from reliable sources. Respect others' opinions while defending your own. Keep an open mind and avoid being confrontational to promote constructive dialogue.,"
  }

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: As an AI language model, I can provide advice on how to handle talks regarding healthcare and COVID immunizations. It is crucial to be well-versed in the most recent scientific data and knowledge when taking part in these discussions since they may quickly get heated and emotional. To foster a factual and useful discourse, it's essential to listen actively, ask questions, and provide evidence from reputable sources. Also, it is vital to be aware of and respect the viewpoints of others while defending one's own. A constructive and productive conversation can be facilitated by maintaining a polite and open-minded attitude.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: . Maintain a neutral tone, pay attention actively, question, and back up your claims with evidence from reliable sources. Respect others' opinions while defending your own. Keep an open mind and avoid being confrontational to promote constructive dialogue.,
